metadata.file_name: Destination - Move On Up (Suite) (Move On Up - Up Up Up).flac
metadata.title: Move On Up (Suite) (Move On Up - Up Up Up)
metadata.lyrics:
[01:15.93] Hush now, child
[01:19.06] And don't you cry
[01:22.23] Your folks might understand you
[01:25.87] By and by
[01:29.20] Just move on up
[01:31.29] (Move on up)
[01:32.56] Toward your destination
[01:35.78] Though you may find, from time to time, complication
[01:57.39] Bite your lip
[02:00.36] And take a trip
[02:03.64] Though there may be wet road ahead
[02:06.84] And you cannot slip
[02:10.75] Just move on up
[02:12.55] (Move on up)
[02:14.39] For peace you'll find
[02:18.25] Into the steeple of beautiful people
[02:21.21] Where there's only one kind
[02:25.38] So hush now, child
[02:28.23] And don't you cry
[02:31.42] Your folks might understand you
[02:34.64] By and by
[02:38.37] Move on up
[02:40.38] (Move on up)
[02:42.20] And keep on wishin'
[02:43.88] (Move on up)
[02:45.73] Remember your dream is your only scheme
[02:48.33] So keep on pushin'
[03:06.48] Take nothing less
[03:09.18] Than the second best
[03:12.71] Do not obey rumors people say
[03:16.00] That you can't pass the test
[03:19.96] Just move on up
[03:21.84] (Move on up)
[03:23.76] To a greater day
[03:25.53] (Move on up)
[03:26.75] With just a little faith
[03:28.45] If you put your mind to it, you can surely do it
[03:48.09] Just move on up
[03:49.77] (Move on up)
[03:51.47] Move on up
[03:53.17] (Move on up)
[03:54.96] But move on up (Move on up)
[03:57.73] Oh, child, but just a-move on up (Move on up)
[03:59.12] But move on up (Move on up)
[04:01.95] Move on up
[04:03.54] (Move on up).
[08:32.19] Curtis Mayfield
[08:33.06]
